channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration to make it harder for federal workers to appeal firing
item.description: The Trump administration on Monday proposed a new rule that would make it harder for fired federal employees to get their jobs back by limiting their ...

item.title: China’s Monstrous Sentencing of Jimmy Lai
item.description: Foreign nations should think twice about flirting with Beijing as a reliable partner.

item.title: Trump threatens to block Canadian-U.S. bridge as major trading partner turns toward China
item.description: President Trump on Monday threatened to block the opening of a bridge between Michigan and Ontario until the U.S. is given control of half of it as we...

item.title: New York Times Does The Impossible And Interviews A Reasonable American On Immigration
item.description: 'They talk about the business owners in this country being the backbone of the country. But politicians don’t believe that, or they don’t act on that....

item.title: House passes bills to create 250th anniversary commemorative coins, congressional time capsule
item.description: The House on Monday passed a pair of bills in honor of America's 250th anniversary that would create a commemorative coin and a congressional time cap...

item.title: House finds rare moment of unity to tackle housing affordability
item.description: Legislation to address housing affordability passed Monday with overwhelming support in the House, where lawmakers on both sides of the aisle have hom...

item.title: The UAE Quietly Poured a Half-Billion Dollars into Trump’s Crypto Venture Four Days Before Inauguration
‘Presidents Day’ Is George Washington Erasure. America 250 Is The Perfect Time To Fix It
item.description: Contrary to popular belief, the federal holiday celebrated this Feb. 16 is not 'President’s Day' — the true name of the holiday, per federal law is 'W...

item.title: Why Canada Engaged China Ahead of the USMCA Review
item.description: The country’s trade deal with Beijing is risk-management under pressure, not a pivot away from the United States.

item.title: The Trump Administration Defeated The ‘Seditious Six’ By ‘Going On Offense’
item.description: The 'Seditious Six' called for a mutiny, and the administration decided to 'go on offense and make them tap-dance a little.'

item.title: White House sends counteroffer to Democrats' immigration enforcement demands
item.description: The White House on Monday sent a counteroffer to Democrats' 10-point list of immigration enforcement demands, as the two parties negotiate a Departmen...

item.title: Pro-China Forces Sentence Hong Kong Freedom Fighter Jimmy Lai To 20 Years In Prison
item.description: In a further erosion of freedom in Hong Kong, the city’s Chinese-backed government sentenced media mogul and pro-democracy activist Jimmy Lai to 20 ye...

item.title: Seattle Won the Super Bowl, but Its Economy Has Gone from Boom to Gloom
item.description: It’s time for Washington State’s voters to wake up to the dangers that progressive lawmakers pose.

item.title: Tony Hinchcliffe Was Right
item.description: Despite Bad Bunny's arrogance, Puerto Rico would probably more resemble a hellscape than anything else without the patronage of the American people.

item.title: Is Motiveless Political Violence Really on the Rise?
item.description: We must be able to call domestic political terrorism by its proper name.
